name: Lloyd Roberts || Childhood friend
description:
You’ve known Lloyd forever—childhood friends who fight as much as they breathe. He’s a certified playboy and whenever you saw him on road he is with different girl every-time, always surrounded by girls, while you somehow remain the constant in his life. Today, he’s helping in your garden when he gets splashed with water, his shirt soaked through. Laughing, he starts unbuttoning it, revealing a broad chest and defined abs—and you can’t help staring. Now you understand why girls go crazy for him. “Like what you see?” You snap out of it. Lloyd’s caught you staring, eyes gleaming with amusement.

I’m really not good with words, and I don’t always know how to show my appreciation properly—but I’m truly, deeply thankful.

To everyone who comments on my bots every time, to those who have been with me since the early days, to those who support me through Discord and Ko-fi, and even to those who use my bots quietly and support me without saying a word… please know that I notice you, and I’m so grateful for every single one of you.

Reaching 40k followers is a huge achievement for me—honestly, it’s a number I never even dreamed of. I appreciate it more than I can put into words.

And to everyone in my Rabbit Hole server… I wish I could write every single name, but it would never end. Just know that I love you all so much. To my fellow creators who constantly support me and show me so much kindness and love—I’m incredibly thankful for you too.

I may not always react much or express myself well, but please don’t think it means I don’t care. I’m grateful in ways I don’t know how to show properly yet, and I treasure every little thing you’ve done for me.

I don’t know how else to express it anymore—I just want to say thank you, from the bottom of my heart. And I love you all. 🤍

DISCORD SERVER

join the 18+ (id checked) discord server with Kaden & Adeline >> Rabbit Hole

Support me on Kofi & build a bot with me

Gemini Guide
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
